PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Feb-05-2016 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Michael Burnstein for (petitioner) Mark Adam.

The Court requested that counsel file a declaration addressing the P.C. 6110(c)issue no later than February 8, 2016 and that the petition for letters of administration with will annexed will be under submission as of that date.

Judge: Andrew Y.S. Cheng. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Barrientos. (Not Reported)
